mapper.sql: CASE WHEN end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time < #{now} THEN 0 WHEN status IN ('已结束', '结束', 'CLOSED', 'ENDED', 'FINISHED', '0') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0
AND = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_activity ( id, activity_id, activity_name, start_time, end_time, status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{statusText}, 0, #{createTime}, #{createTime} ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id) DO NOTHING
